nasb.text: You eat the fat and clothe yourselves with the wool, you slaughter the fat sheep without feeding the flock.

esv.text: You eat the fat, you clothe yourselves with the wool, you slaughter the fat ones, but you do not feed the sheep.

cnv.text: 你們吃脂油、穿羊毛，宰肥壯的羊，卻不牧養羊群。

ccb.text: 但你们只顾吃羊的脂肪，穿羊毛衣，宰杀肥羊，却不照顾羊群。
